name: Nocturnus
description:
-ˏˋ⋆ april flowers event day 6 || cryptid || any!pov ⋆ˊˎ- 🐺 There are many great benefits to living alone in the middle of the woods. You're surrounded by the beauty of nature, its nice and quiet unlike the bustle of the village, and have a large wolf like cryptid who has sworn to protect you. Just keep giving him head scratches and you'll be fine! Also ignore the large deer he just dropped on your doorstep.

*this is my favorite cover i made next to tomorrows*
